case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. FARID BEKHOUCH ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 57111945) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEKHOUCH, FARID AN INDIVIDUAL $3,746.46 PRINCIPAL, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,036.46, (TRANSACTION ID # 57111945)
DECLARATION AND AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 57111945) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-29-2024 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. NO APPEARANCES, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO WITHHOLD $150 PER PAY PERIOD ($300 PER MONTH) TO SATISFY THE DEBT. THE COURT WILL EXECUTE A JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM OF ORDER REFLECTING THE RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. NOT REPORTED. DEPUTY: NOT PRESENT. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

The levying officer is directed to withhold $150 per pay period ($300 per month) to satisfy the debt.

The Court will execute a judicial council form of order reflecting the ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Deputy: Not Present. (302/RBU)
